primary_flags.arc_promotion: CANDIDATE → WATCHING (2 signals reached; arc promotes to WATCHING)
primary_flags.summary: Pre-signal — emotional state relay. ROW-3127: 'Olivia is over here crying' — Melissa delivers Olivia's real-time emotional distress as a pressure instrument. The message positions Olivia's emotional state as direct evidence of Eli's failure. Cross-reference RF01-B009-S001 (ADD-004): the RF-01 pass flagged this cluster for the same relay mechanism. RF-08 classification: Olivia's emotional experience is extracted, relayed, and weaponized by Melissa as co-parenting pressure against Eli — Olivia is not a party to this conversation but her emotional state is made a central exhibit in Melissa's argument. Note: pre-signal per ADD-002 — precedes confirmed coaching admission (ROW-6819, B-018).
primary_flags.rf08_mechanism: Emotional state relay: Olivia's distress communicated to Eli as pressure evidence. Child's emotional experience used as leverage without child's participation in the adult conflict.

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF08-001 promoted to WATCHING: 2 signals (S001-S002). Arc activation deferred to ROW-6819 (B-018) per ADD-002 — coaching admission is the arc activation anchor.

compound_patterns.description: Emotional state relay compounds with RF-01 ADD-004: ROW-3127 simultaneously delivers parental alienation content (Olivia's distress attributed to Eli's inadequacy) and triangulates Olivia as co-parenting pressure instrument.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Phase A. S002 documents the emotional-relay sub-pattern: Melissa converting Olivia's distress into co-parenting evidence.
batch_observations.rf08_assessment: One Sev-1 pre-signal. Arc promoted to WATCHING. The emotional-relay pattern (using Olivia's reported distress as pressure) is distinct from coaching content delivery but both are components of the relay-through-Olivia mechanism.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-01 ADD-004 compound. The 'Olivia is over here crying' pattern recurs throughout the dataset — this is the first documented instance.
